parts.text:
Now I understand the issue. The compilation errors are in `ClasspathScanner.java` at lines 64 and 69:

1. Line 64: `return new FilterBuilder().include(".+\\.class").apply(s);`
2. Line 69: `if (new FilterBuilder().include(regex).apply(s))`

The `FilterBuilder.include()` method returns a `FilterBuilder` object that should be used directly as a predicate, not calling `.apply(s)`. In newer versions of the reflections library, the API changed. The `FilterBuilder` implements `Predicate<String>` so it should be called with `.test(s)` instead of `.apply(s)`.

Actually, looking at the Reflections library API, `FilterBuilder` implements `Predicate<String>`, so the method should be `.test(s)` instead of `.apply(s)`.

<content>1: /*----------------------------------------------------------------

6: package com.thoughtworks.gauge.scan;
7: 
8: import com.thoughtworks.gauge.ClasspathHelper;
9: import org.reflections.Configuration;
10: import org.reflections.Reflections;
11: import org.reflections.scanners.MethodAnnotationsScanner;
12: import org.reflections.scanners.SubTypesScanner;
13: import org.reflections.util.ConfigurationBuilder;
14: import org.reflections.util.FilterBuilder;
15: import org.reflections.vfs.SystemDir;
16: import org.reflections.vfs.Vfs;
17: import org.reflections.vfs.ZipDir;
18: import java.io.File;
19: import java.net.URL;
20: import java.util.jar.JarFile;
21: import static com.thoughtworks.gauge.GaugeConstant.PACKAGE_TO_SCAN;
22: 
23: /**
24:  * Scans the current Classpath and passes to all the scanners passed.
25:  */
26: public class ClasspathScanner {
27: 
28:     private Reflections reflections;
29: 
30:     public void scan(IScanner... scanners) {
31:         reflections = createReflections();
32:         for (IScanner scanner : scanners) {
33:             scanner.scan(reflections);
34:         }
35:     }
36: 
37:     private Reflections createReflections() {
38:         Vfs.addDefaultURLTypes(new Vfs.UrlType() {
39: 
40:             @Override
41:             public boolean matches(URL url) {
42:                 return "file".equals(url.getProtocol());
43:             }
44: 
45:             @Override
46:             public Vfs.Dir createDir(URL url) throws Exception {
47:                 File file = Vfs.getFile(url);
48:                 return file.isDirectory() ? new SystemDir(file) : new ZipDir(new JarFile(Vfs.getFile(url)));
49:             }
50:         });
51:         Configuration config = new ConfigurationBuilder().setScanners(new MethodAnnotationsScanner(), new SubTypesScanner()).addUrls(ClasspathHelper.getUrls()).filterInputsBy(this::shouldScan);
52:         return new Reflections(config);
53:     }
54: 
55:     private boolean shouldScan(String s) {
56:         final String packagesToScan = System.getenv(PACKAGE_TO_SCAN);
57:         if (packagesToScan == null || packagesToScan.isEmpty()) {
58:             return new FilterBuilder().include(".+\\.class").test(s);
59:         }
60:         final String[] packages = packagesToScan.split(",");
61:         for (String packageToScan : packages) {
62:             String regex = String.format(".?\\.??%s\\..+\\.class", packageToScan);
63:             if (new FilterBuilder().include(regex).test(s)) {
64:                 return true;
65:             }
66:         }
67:         return false;
68:     }
69: }

(End of file - total 69 lines)
</content>

<content>1: /*----------------------------------------------------------------
2:  *  Copyright (c) ThoughtWorks, Inc.
3:  *  Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0
4:  *  See LICENSE.txt in the project root for license information.
5:  *----------------------------------------------------------------*/
6: package com.thoughtworks.gauge.processor;
7: 
8: import com.google.common.base.Charsets;
9: import com.thoughtworks.gauge.scan.StaticScanner;
10: import gauge.messages.Messages;
11: import java.io.File;
12: 
13: public class CacheFileRequestProcessor implements IMessageProcessor {
14: 
15:     private StaticScanner staticScanner;
16: 
17:     public CacheFileRequestProcessor(StaticScanner staticScanner) {
18:         this.staticScanner = staticScanner;
19:     }
20: 
21:     @Override
22:     public Messages.Message process(Messages.Message request) {
23:         String fileName = request.getCacheFileRequest().getFilePath();
24:         String contents = request.getCacheFileRequest().getContent();
25:         Messages.CacheFileRequest.FileStatus status = request.getCacheFileRequest().getStatus();
26:         switch(status) {
27:             case OPENED:
28:             case CHANGED:
29:                 staticScanner.reloadSteps(fileName, contents);
30:                 break;
31:             case DELETED:
32:                 staticScanner.removeSteps(fileName);
33:                 break;
34:             case CREATED:
35:                 if (!staticScanner.isFileCached(fileName)) {
36:                     loadFromDisk(fileName);
37:                 }
38:                 break;
39:             case CLOSED:
40:                 loadFromDisk(fileName);
41:                 break;
42:             default:
43:                 throw new IllegalArgumentException();
44:         }
45:         return Messages.Message.newBuilder().build();
46:     }
47: 
48:     private void loadFromDisk(String fileName) {
49:         if ((new File(fileName).exists())) {
50:             staticScanner.reloadSteps(fileName, staticScanner.readFile(fileName, Charsets.UTF_8));
51:         }
52:     }
53: }

(End of file - total 53 lines)
</content>

6: package com.thoughtworks.gauge;

8: import gauge.messages.Spec;
9: import java.util.ArrayList;
10: import java.util.List;
11: import java.util.Objects;
12: 
13: public class StepValue {
14: 
15:     private final String stepText;
16: 
17:     private final String parameterizedStepText;
18: 
19:     private final List<String> parameters;
20: 
21:     public StepValue(String stepText, String parameterizedStepText, List<String> parameters) {
22:         this.stepText = stepText;
23:         this.parameterizedStepText = parameterizedStepText;
24:         this.parameters = parameters;
25:     }
26: 
27:     public StepValue(String stepTemplateText, String parameterizedStepText) {
28:         this.stepText = stepTemplateText;
29:         this.parameterizedStepText = parameterizedStepText;
30:         this.parameters = new ArrayList<String>();
31:     }
32: 
33:     public static StepValue from(Spec.ProtoStepValue protoStepValue) {
34:         return new StepValue(protoStepValue.getStepValue(), protoStepValue.getParameterizedStepValue(), protoStepValue.getParametersList());
35:     }
36: 
37:     public String getStepText() {
38:         return stepText;
39:     }
40: 
41:     public List<String> getParameters() {
42:         return parameters;
43:     }
44: 
45:     public String getStepAnnotationText() {
46:         return parameterizedStepText;
47:     }
48: 
49:     @Override
50:     public boolean equals(Object o) {
51:         if (this == o) {
52:             return true;
53:         }
54:         if (!(o instanceof StepValue)) {
55:             return false;
56:         }
57:         StepValue stepValue = (StepValue) o;
58:         return Objects.equals(parameterizedStepText, stepValue.parameterizedStepText) && Objects.equals(parameters, stepValue.parameters) && Objects.equals(stepText, stepValue.stepText);
59:     }
60: 
61:     @Override
62:     public int hashCode() {
63:         int result = stepText != null ? stepText.hashCode() : 0;
64:         // SUPPRESS CHECKSTYLE
65:         result = 31 * result + (parameterizedStepText != null ? parameterizedStepText.hashCode() : 0);
66:         // SUPPRESS CHECKSTYLE
67:         result = 31 * result + (parameters != null ? parameters.hashCode() : 0);
68:         return result;
69:     }
70: 
71:     @Override
72:     public String toString() {
73:         return "StepValue{" + "stepText='" + stepText + '\'' + ", parameterizedStepText='" + parameterizedStepText + '\'' + ", parameters=" + parameters + '}';
74:     }
75: }
